title: Implement network == none
body:
When network == none, the container should only have a
loopback interface and that's it.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: Tests seem to be failing. Might be a bug in the code, but I recall a lot of tests that should have been failing returning 0 when I was working on the DB, so that could be related
@baude I think you travis issues look legitimate.
